.gitlab-ci.yml.command: python3 -c 'import yaml,sys; yaml.load(open(".gitlab-ci.yml"), Loader=type("L", (yaml.SafeLoader,), {})); print("OK")' || true
.gitlab-ci.yml.purpose: verify the GitLab CI entry parses (stages, workflow rules, includes resolvable)

.gitlab/.command: bash -c 'for f in .gitlab-ci.yml .gitlab/ci/*.yml; do python3 -c "import yaml,sys; yaml.SafeLoader.add_multi_constructor(\"!\", lambda l,t,n: None); yaml.load(open(sys.argv[1]), Loader=yaml.SafeLoader)" "$f" || exit 1; done; echo OK'
.gitlab/.purpose: verify every translated GitLab CI workflow file parses

.gitlab/ci/.command: bash -c 'for f in .gitlab/ci/*.yml; do python3 -c "import yaml,sys; yaml.SafeLoader.add_multi_constructor(\"!\", lambda l,t,n: None); yaml.load(open(sys.argv[1]), Loader=yaml.SafeLoader)" "$f" || exit 1; done; echo OK'
